what_it_does: This file is an allocation batch manifest that lists six source files from the claude-ds project, all under app/registry, selected for interpretive processing in wave-002.
observations: Every entry shares the same project ('claude-ds') and root path ('/home/tim/company/design/claude-ds')
The batch contains five JS modules and one JSX component (SaveAsTypeModal.jsx)
File names revolve around types, kinds, adapters, hooks, seeds, and a save-as-type modal
It is named wave-002/alloc/batch-012.json, implying a sequenced batching scheme
No code symbols are included in the manifest
standards: Tightly scoped to registry/type subsystem files
Mixes a UI modal with underlying type infrastructure modules
Uniform project/root metadata with only the relative path varying
conventions: Uses a JSON array of objects with consistent 'project', 'path', and 'root' keys
Groups files by subsystem directory rather than by import graph
concerns: Absolute root path is hardcoded to a local filesystem location
No rationale is given for why these six files form a batch
No symbols are provided, so the manifest cannot be cross-referenced by code identifiers
notes: A wave-002 allocation batch that picks up the claude-ds registry type-system slice, including both the SaveAsTypeModal UI and the supporting type modules.
questions: What criteria define batch-012 versus adjacent batches?
What does 'wave-002' represent in the overall interpretive pipeline?
Are these files meant to be processed together because they depend on each other or simply because they share a subsystem folder?
Why are no symbols extracted for this batch?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose as an allocation manifest matches the content: it enumerates files assigned for interpretive processing.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to schedule a coherent slice of the claude-ds registry/type subsystem for interpretive analysis as a single processing unit.
contribution: It contributes a scoped, subsystem-oriented file list that a fused system would keep as a processing unit for registry/type-related code and design substrates.
summary_for_embedding: A wave-002 allocation batch manifest listing six claude-ds app/registry files, including a JSX modal and several type-system JS modules, with no extracted symbols.
intention_for_embedding: This file was meant to assign a focused set of registry/type subsystem files to an interpretive processing batch.
